title: TreeCap
description: Chop down entire trees by breaking a single log with an axe.
body:
Tree Cap is a simple server-friendly mod that makes chopping trees easier.

When a player breaks a log with an axe, the entire tree will automatically be chopped down.

**Features**

🌳 Chop down entire trees at once by breaking a single log.

🪓 Works only with axes to keep the mod balanced.

🔧 Axe durability is consumed for every log broken, meaning large trees will damage your tool more.

🪵 Sneak mechanic – if the player holds Shift while mining, the log becomes 5× harder to break.

🌐 Fully server compatible – the mod works in multiplayer without requiring it on the client.

Tree Cap is perfect for players who want faster tree cutting while keeping the survival balance.
